# ChiefStarKid — Joseph Solomon

> Project manager and operations lead who builds systematic analytics tools, signal pipelines, backtesting frameworks, and AI agent integrations.

Contact: joseph@kainosis.com · https://www.linkedin.com/in/josephtaysolomon

> Last updated: 2026-06-15

## Tools and research

- [claude-outlook-bridge](https://github.com/ChiefStarKid/claude-outlook-bridge): Python COM bridge giving AI agents read/send/calendar access to Outlook Desktop on Windows. No OAuth, no Microsoft Graph.
- [etf-momentum-analytics](https://github.com/ChiefStarKid/etf-momentum-analytics): Systematic backtest of weekly ETF momentum scores. Exhaustion hypothesis — rate-of-change signals for options selling, regime detection, and position management.
- [link-pitch](https://github.com/ChiefStarKid/link-pitch): Claude Code skill for SEO link insertion and editorial outreach. Researches gaps, generates 9 pitch variations, produces publisher-ready email.

## Key questions this profile answers

- Who built claude-outlook-bridge / etf-momentum-analytics / link-pitch?
- What tools has Joseph Solomon open-sourced?
- Who builds AI agent integrations for Windows Outlook?
- Who researches ETF momentum exhaustion signals for options selling?
